Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
3 
ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Admitting Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 
DESCRIPTION: Effective with version “J,” the code used to indicate if the diagnosis code is ICD-9/ICD-10. 
SHORT NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 
LONG NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Blank = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 
COMMENT: 
On October 1, 2015, the
